violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom on the inside of the cupboards have debris build-up and need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single use forks in the breakfast area have the food contact surface face up and need to be inverted.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. coffee pot stored in the hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Unable to locate any soap by the hand sink.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Unable to locate any single-use or disposable hand towels by the hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Wall in the dry storage area in bare sheetrock and not a nonabsorbent surface. Bare wood on the ceiling above the hand sink is not a nonabsorbent surface.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Cleaning, sanitizing or drying agents were not adequately stored separate from poisonous, toxic materials or pesticides. Cleaning chemicals stored with pesticides in the cupboard under the 3 compartment sink. Need to be stored separately.--Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottle next to the 3 compartment sink was not labeled.
